pinocchio.h
Go to the documentation of this file.
1/*****************************************************************
2 * PINOCCHIO V5.1 *
3 * (PINpointing Orbit-Crossing Collapsed HIerarchical Objects) *
4 *****************************************************************
5
6 This code was written by
7 Pierluigi Monaco, Tom Theuns, Giuliano Taffoni, Marius Lepinzan,
8 Chiara Moretti, Luca Tornatore, David Goz, Tiago Castro
9 Copyright (C) 2025
10
11 github: https://github.com/pigimonaco/Pinocchio
12 web page: http://adlibitum.oats.inaf.it/monaco/pinocchio.html
13
14 This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify
15 it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
16 the Free Software Foundation; either version 2 of the License, or
17 (at your option) any later version.
18
19 This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
20 but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
21 MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the
22 GNU General Public License for more details.
23
24 You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
25 along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software
26 Foundation, Inc., 59 Temple Place, Suite 330, Boston, MA 02111-1307 USA
27*/
28
29#include <stdlib.h>
30#include <stdio.h>
31#include <math.h>
32#include <mpi.h>
33#include <string.h>
34#include <time.h>
35#include <gsl/gsl_errno.h>
36#include <gsl/gsl_math.h>
37#include <gsl/gsl_rng.h>
38#include <gsl/gsl_randist.h>
39#include <gsl/gsl_roots.h>
40#include <gsl/gsl_integration.h>
41#include <gsl/gsl_odeiv2.h>
42#include <gsl/gsl_spline.h>
43#include <fftw3-mpi.h>
44#include <pfft.h>
45#ifdef _OPENMP
46#include <omp.h>
47#endif
48
49/* this library is used to vectorize the computation of collapse times */
50/* #if !(defined(__aarch64__) || defined(__arm__)) */
51/* #include <immintrin.h> */
52/* #endif */
53
54/* Defines */
55#define NYQUIST 1.
56#define PI 3.14159265358979323846
57#define LBLENGTH 400
58#define SBLENGTH 100
59#define GBYTE 1073741824.0
60#define MBYTE 1048576.0
61#define alloc_verbose 0
62#define MAXOUTPUTS 100
63#define SPEEDOFLIGHT ((double)299792.458) /* km/s */
64#define GRAVITY ((double)4.30200e-9) /* (M_sun^-1 (km/s)^2 Mpc) */
65#define NBINS 210 /* number of time bins in cosmological quantities */
66#define FRAGFIELDS 6
67
68#define NSIGMA ((double)6.0)
69#define STEP_VAR ((double)0.3) // 0.2) /* this sets the spacing for smoothing radii */
70
71#define NV 6
72#define FILAMENT 1
73#define SHIFT 0.5
74
75#define ORDER_FOR_GROUPS 2
76#define ORDER_FOR_CATALOG 3
77
78#define ALIGN 32 /* for memory alignment */
79#define UINTLEN 32 /* 8*sizeof(unsigned int) */
80
81// #define ADD_RMAX_TO_SNAPSHOT
82
83/* these templates define how to pass from coordinates to indices */
84#define INDEX_TO_COORD(I, X, Y, Z, L) ({Z=(I)%L[_z_]; int _KK_=(I)/L[_z_]; Y=_KK_%L[_y_]; X=_KK_/L[_y_]; })
85#define COORD_TO_INDEX(X, Y, Z, L) ((Z) + L[_z_] * ((Y) + L[_y_] * (X)))
86
87/* coordinates */
88#define _x_ 0
89#define _y_ 1
90#define _z_ 2
91
92#define DECOMPOSITION_LIMIT_FACTOR_2D 1 /* smallest allowed side lenght of rectangular pencils in */
93 /* 2D decomposition of FFT */
94
95/* debug levels */
96#define dprintf(LEVEL, TASK, ...) \
97 do \
98 { \
99 if (((LEVEL) <= internal.verbose_level) && (ThisTask == (TASK))) \
100 fprintf(stdout, __VA_ARGS__); \
101 } while (1 == 0)
102#define VDBG 4 // verbose level for debug
103#define VDIAG 2 // verbose level for diagnostics
104#define VMSG 1 // verbose level for flow messages
105#define VXX 0 // essential messages
106#define VERR VXX // non letal errors
107#define VXERR -1 // letal errors
108
109#define SWAP_INT(A, B) (A) ^= (B), (B) ^= (A), (A) ^= (B);
110
111/* checks of compiler flags */
112#if defined(THREE_LPT) && !defined(TWO_LPT)
113#define TWO_LPT
114#endif
115
116#if !defined(ELL_SNG) && !defined(ELL_CLASSIC)
117#define ELL_CLASSIC
118#endif
119
120#if (defined(READ_PK_TABLE) || defined(MOD_GRAV_FR)) && !defined(SCALE_DEPENDENT)
121#define SCALE_DEPENDENT
122#endif
123
124#if defined(READ_PK_TABLE) && defined(MOD_GRAV_FR)
125#error REAK_PK_TABLE and MOD_GRAV_FR cannot be chosen together
126#endif
127
128#if defined(MOD_GRAV_FR) && !defined(FR0)
129#error Please set a value to FR0 when you choose MOD_GRAV_FR
130#endif
131
132#if defined(MOD_GRAV_FR) && defined(FR0)
133#warning "You have correctly compiled the code for the modified gravity scenario. However, please keep in mind that the modified gravity run (MOD_GRAV_FR) is still under development, and this mode should be used with extreme caution as it may not be fully stable. If you are unsure about its usage, please contact the developers for guidance."
134#endif
135
136/* Feature gating and sanity checks for Past Light Cone mass maps */
137#if defined(MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED) && !defined(SNAPSHOT)
138#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT to provide per-particle collapse redshift (ZACC). Enable SNAPSHOT or disable MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED."
139#endif
140
141/* vectorialization */
142#define DVEC_SIZE 4
143
144typedef double dvec __attribute__((vector_size(DVEC_SIZE * sizeof(double))));
145typedef long int ivec __attribute__((vector_size(DVEC_SIZE * sizeof(long int))));
146
147typedef union
148{
149 dvec V;
150 double v[DVEC_SIZE];
151} dvec_u;
152
153typedef union
154{
155 ivec V;
156 int v[DVEC_SIZE];
157} ivec_u;
158
159/* variables and type definitions */
160extern int ThisTask, NTasks;
161/* pfft-related variables */
162/* extern int pfft_flags_c2r, pfft_flags_r2c; */
163extern MPI_Comm FFT_Comm;
164
165typedef struct
166{
167 int tasks_subdivision_dim; /* 1, 2 or 3 to divide in slabs, pencils and volumes */
168 int tasks_subdivision_3D[4]; /* ??? */
169 int constrain_task_decomposition[3]; /* constraints on the number of subdivisions for each dimension */
170 int verbose_level; /* for dprintf */
171 int mimic_original_seedtable; /* logical, set to 1 to reproduce exactly GenIC */
172 // int dump_vectors; /* logical, dump vectors to files */
173 int dump_seedplane; /* logical, dump seedplane to files */
174 int dump_kdensity; /* logical, dump Fourier-space density to files */
175 int large_plane; /* select the new generation of ICs */
176 int nthreads_omp; /* number of OMP threads */
177 int nthreads_fft; /* number of FFT threads */
178} internal_data;
179extern internal_data internal;
180
181typedef unsigned int uint;
182// typedef unsigned long long int UL; // mi pare non ci sia
183
184#ifdef DOUBLE_PRECISION_PRODUCTS
185#define MPI_PRODFLOAT MPI_DOUBLE
186typedef double PRODFLOAT;
187#else
188#define MPI_PRODFLOAT MPI_FLOAT
189typedef float PRODFLOAT;
190#endif
191
192typedef struct // RIALLINEARE?
193{
194 int Rmax;
195 PRODFLOAT Fmax, Vel[3];
196#ifdef TWO_LPT
197 PRODFLOAT Vel_2LPT[3];
198#ifdef THREE_LPT
199 PRODFLOAT Vel_3LPT_1[3], Vel_3LPT_2[3];
200#endif
201#endif
202
203#ifdef SNAPSHOT
204 PRODFLOAT zacc;
205 int group_ID;
206#endif
207
208#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
209 PRODFLOAT Vel_prev[3];
210#ifdef TWO_LPT
211 PRODFLOAT Vel_2LPT_prev[3];
212#ifdef THREE_LPT
213 PRODFLOAT Vel_3LPT_1_prev[3], Vel_3LPT_2_prev[3];
214#endif
215#endif
216#endif
217
218} product_data __attribute__((aligned(ALIGN))); // VERIFICARE
219
220extern char *main_memory, *wheretoplace_mycat;
221
222extern product_data *products, *frag;
223
224extern unsigned int *cubes_ordering;
225
226extern unsigned int **seedtable;
227
228extern double **kdensity;
229extern double **density;
230extern double ***first_derivatives;
231extern double ***second_derivatives;
232
233#ifdef TWO_LPT
234extern double *kvector_2LPT;
235extern double *source_2LPT;
236#ifdef THREE_LPT
237extern double *kvector_3LPT_1, *kvector_3LPT_2;
238extern double *source_3LPT_1, *source_3LPT_2;
239#endif
240#endif

242extern double Rsmooth;
243typedef struct
244{
245 int Nsmooth;
246 double *Radius, *Variance, *TrueVariance;
247#ifdef SCALE_DEPENDENT
248 double *Rad_GM, *k_GM_dens, *k_GM_displ, *k_GM_vel;
249#endif
250} smoothing_data;
251extern smoothing_data Smoothing;
252
253extern int Ngrids;
254typedef struct
255{
256 unsigned int total_local_size, total_local_size_fft;
257 unsigned int off, ParticlesPerTask;
258 ptrdiff_t GSglobal[3];
259 ptrdiff_t GSlocal[3];
260 ptrdiff_t GSstart[3];
261 ptrdiff_t GSlocal_k[3];
262 ptrdiff_t GSstart_k[3];
263 double lower_k_cutoff, upper_k_cutoff, norm, BoxSize, CellSize;
264 pfft_plan forward_plan, reverse_plan;
265 unsigned long long Ntotal;
266} grid_data;
267extern grid_data *MyGrids;
268
269extern pfft_complex **cvector_fft;
270extern double **rvector_fft;
271
272#ifdef READ_PK_TABLE
273typedef struct
274{
275 int Nkbins, NCAMB;
276 char MatterFile[SBLENGTH], RedshiftsFile[LBLENGTH];
277 double *Logk, *LogPkref, D2ref, *Scalef, *RefGM;
278} camb_data;
279#endif
280
281typedef struct
282{
283 double Omega0, OmegaLambda, Hubble100, Sigma8, OmegaBaryon, DEw0, DEwa,
284 PrimordialIndex, InterPartDist, BoxSize, BoxSize_htrue, BoxSize_h100, ParticleMass,
285 StartingzForPLC, LastzForPLC, InputSpectrum_UnitLength_in_cm, WDM_PartMass_in_kev,
286 BoundaryLayerFactor, Largest, MaxMemPerParticle, k_for_GM, PredPeakFactor, PLCAperture,
287 PLCCenter[3], PLCAxis[3];
288 char RunFlag[SBLENGTH], DumpDir[SBLENGTH], TabulatedEoSfile[LBLENGTH], ParameterFile[LBLENGTH],
289 OutputList[LBLENGTH], FileWithInputSpectrum[LBLENGTH], CTtableFile[LBLENGTH];
290 int GridSize[3], DumpProducts, ReadProductsFromDumps,
291 CatalogInAscii, DoNotWriteCatalogs, DoNotWriteHistories, WriteTimelessSnapshot,
292 OutputInH100, RandomSeed, MaxMem, NumFiles,
293 BoxInH100, simpleLambda, AnalyticMassFunction, MinHaloMass, PLCProvideConeData, ExitIfExtraParticles,
294 use_transposed_fft, FixedIC, PairedIC,
295 NumMassPlanes, /* number of mass planes for MASS_MAPS feature (0 disables) */
296 MassMapNSIDE; /* HEALPix NSIDE for MASS_MAPS (0 disables) */
297 double MassMapMasterMaxGB; /* Max GB of memory rank 0 may use for one HEALPix plane (counts array) */
298#ifdef READ_HUBBLE_TABLE
299 char HubbleTableFile[LBLENGTH];
300#endif
301#ifdef READ_PK_TABLE
302 camb_data camb;
303#endif
304} param_data;
305extern param_data params;
306
307typedef struct
308{
309 int n;
310 double F[MAXOUTPUTS], z[MAXOUTPUTS], zlast, Flast;
311} output_data;
312extern output_data outputs;
313
314typedef struct
315{
316 unsigned int Npart, Ngood, Nstored, PredNpeaks, maplength;
317 unsigned int Nalloc, Nneeded;
318 int nbox[3];
319 int mybox[3];
320 int Lgrid[3];
321 int Lgwbl[3];
322 int start[3];
323 int stabl[3];
324 int safe[3];
325 int pbc[3];
326 double SafetyBorder, overhead;
327} subbox_data;
328extern subbox_data subbox;
329
330#ifdef MASS_MAPS
331/* ------------------------------------------------------------ */
332/* Mass sheet definitions derived from output redshift list */
333/* Each consecutive pair (z_hi > z_lo) defines one sheet. */
334/* ------------------------------------------------------------ */
335typedef struct
336{
337 double z_hi, z_lo; /* redshift bounds (z_hi > z_lo) */
338 double chi_hi, chi_lo; /* comoving distances (same order) */
339 double inv_dchi; /* 1/(chi_hi - chi_lo) */
340 double delta_z; /* z_hi - z_lo */
341 double delta_chi; /* chi_hi - chi_lo */
342 double da_hi, da_lo; /* angular diameter distances at boundaries */
343 double chi3_diff; /* chi_hi^3 - chi_lo^3 */
344} MassSheet;
345
346extern MassSheet *MassSheets;
347extern int NMassSheets; /* = outputs.n - 1 when MASS_MAPS active */
348extern double *MassMapBoundaryZ; /* length NMassSheets+1 (== outputs.n) */
349extern double *MassMapBoundaryChi; /* length NMassSheets+1 */
350extern double *MassMapBoundaryDA; /* length NMassSheets+1 */
351int mass_maps_init_sheets(void); /* allocate & fill MassSheets; returns 0 on success */
352void mass_maps_free_sheets(void);
353int mass_maps_write_sheet_table(void);
354
355/* MASS_MAPS / PLC auxiliary utilities */
356int mass_maps_particle_sign_change(int rep_id,
357 const double q[3], /* Lagrangian or reference position */
358 const double disp_prev[3], /* previous total displacement */
359 const double disp_curr[3], /* current total displacement */
360 double z_prev, /* previous redshift */
361 double z_curr, /* current redshift */
362 double *alpha_out, /* crossing interpolation fraction (0..1) */
363 double entry_pos[3]); /* interpolated entry Eulerian position */
364int mass_maps_point_inside_lightcone(const double pos[3], long *ipix_out); /* if inside and NSIDE>0 sets *ipix_out, else -1 */
365/* Segment-level orchestrator (called after build_groups). */
366void mass_maps_process_segment(int segment_index, double z_segment, int is_first_segment);
367#endif /* MASS_MAPS */
368
369typedef struct
370{
371 double init, total, dens, fft, coll, invcoll, ell, vel, lpt, fmax, distr, sort, group, frag, io,
372 deriv, mem_transf, partial, set_subboxes, set_plc, memory_allocation, fft_initialization
373#ifdef PLC
374 ,
375 plc
376#endif
377 ;
378} cputime_data;
379extern cputime_data cputime;
380
381extern int WindowFunctionType;
382
383typedef struct
384{
385 int Mass;
386 PRODFLOAT Pos[3], Vel[3];
387#ifdef TWO_LPT
388 PRODFLOAT Vel_2LPT[3];
389#ifdef THREE_LPT
390 PRODFLOAT Vel_3LPT_1[3], Vel_3LPT_2[3];
391#endif
392#endif
393#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
394 PRODFLOAT Vel_prev[3];
395#ifdef TWO_LPT
396 PRODFLOAT Vel_2LPT_prev[3];
397#ifdef THREE_LPT
398 PRODFLOAT Vel_3LPT_1_prev[3], Vel_3LPT_2_prev[3];
399#endif
400#endif
401#endif
402 int ll, halo_app, mass_at_merger, merged_with, point, bottom, good;
403 PRODFLOAT t_appear, t_peak, t_merge;
404 unsigned long long int name;
405 int trackT, trackC;
406#ifdef PLC
407 PRODFLOAT Flast;
408#endif
409} group_data;
410extern group_data *groups;
411
412#ifdef PLC
413typedef struct
414{
415 int i, j, k;
416 PRODFLOAT F1, F2;
417} replication_data;
418
419typedef struct
420{
421 int Nreplications, Nmax, Nstored, Nstored_last, Nhalotot;
422 double Nexpected;
423 double Fstart, Fstop, center[3];
424 double xvers[3], yvers[3], zvers[3];
425 replication_data *repls;
426 int nzbins;
427 double delta_z, *nz;
428} plc_data;
429extern plc_data plc;
430
431typedef struct
432{
433 int Mass;
434 unsigned long long int name;
435 PRODFLOAT z, x[3], v[3]; //,rhor,theta,phi;
436} plcgroup_data;
437extern plcgroup_data *plcgroups;
438#endif
439
440extern char date_string[25];
441
442extern int *frag_pos, *indices, *indicesY, *sorted_pos, *group_ID, *linking_list;
443
444extern unsigned int *frag_map, *frag_map_update;
445extern int map_to_be_used;
446
447/* fragmentation parameters */
448extern double f_m, f_rm, espo, f_a, f_ra, f_200, sigmaD0;
449
450#define NWINT 1000
451extern gsl_integration_workspace *workspace;
452extern gsl_rng *random_generator;
453#define TOLERANCE ((double)1.e-4)
454
455typedef struct
456{
457 unsigned long long int name;
458 int nick, ll, mw, mass, mam;
459 PRODFLOAT zme, zpe, zap;
460} histories_data;
461
462#define DELTAM 0.05
463
464typedef struct
465{
466 int NBIN;
467 double mmin, mmax, vol, hfactor, hfactor4;
468 int *ninbin, *ninbin_local;
469 double *massinbin, *massinbin_local;
470} mf_data;
471extern mf_data mf;
472
473/* splines for interpolations */
474extern gsl_spline **SPLINE;
475extern gsl_interp_accel **ACCEL;
476#if defined(SCALE_DEPENDENT) && defined(ELL_CLASSIC)
477extern gsl_spline **SPLINE_INVGROW;
478extern gsl_interp_accel **ACCEL_INVGROW;
479#endif
480
481#ifdef MOD_GRAV_FR
482extern double H_over_c;
483#endif
484
485typedef struct
486{
487 size_t prods, fields, fields_to_keep, fft, first_allocated, fmax_total,
488 frag_prods, frag_arrays, groups, frag_allocated, frag_total, all_allocated, all;
489} memory_data;
490extern memory_data memory;
491
492extern int ngroups;
493
494typedef struct
495{
496 int M, i;
497 PRODFLOAT R, q[3], v[3], D, Dv, w;
498 double z, myk;
499#ifdef TWO_LPT
500 PRODFLOAT D2, D2v, v2[3], w2;
501#ifdef THREE_LPT
502 PRODFLOAT D31, D31v, v31[3], D32, D32v, v32[3], w31, w32;
503#endif
504#endif
505#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
506 PRODFLOAT v_prev[3];
507#ifdef TWO_LPT
508 PRODFLOAT v2_prev[3];
509#ifdef THREE_LPT
510 PRODFLOAT v31_prev[3], v32_prev[3];
511#endif
512#endif
513#endif
514} pos_data;
515
516typedef struct
517{
518 unsigned long long int name;
519 PRODFLOAT M, x[3], v[3];
520 PRODFLOAT q[3];
521#ifndef LIGHT_OUTPUT
522 int n;
523 int pad;
524#endif
525} catalog_data;
526
527typedef struct
528{
529 unsigned long long int name;
530#ifndef LIGHT_OUTPUT
531 PRODFLOAT red, x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, Mass, theta, phi, v_los, obsz;
532#else
533 PRODFLOAT red, Mass, theta, phi, obsz;
534#endif
535} plc_write_data;
536
537typedef struct
538{
539 int nseg, myseg, no_interp, order;
540 double z[MAXOUTPUTS], D[MAXOUTPUTS], D2[MAXOUTPUTS], D31[MAXOUTPUTS], D32[MAXOUTPUTS];
541 double redshift; /* this is the redshift used in compute_derivative */
542} ScaleDep_data;
543extern ScaleDep_data ScaleDep;
544
545/* prototypes for functions defined in collapse_times.c */
546int compute_collapse_times(int);
547#ifdef TABULATED_CT
548int initialize_collapse_times(int, int);
549int reset_collapse_times(int);
550#endif
551
552/* prototypes for functions defined in fmax-fftw.c */
553int set_one_grid(int);
554int compute_fft_plans();
555double forward_transform(int);
556double reverse_transform(int);
557int finalize_fft();
558int compute_derivative(int, int, int);
559void write_in_cvector(int, double *);
560void write_from_cvector(int, double *);
561void write_in_rvector(int, double *);
562void write_from_rvector(int, double *);
563void write_from_rvector_to_products(int, int, int);
564
565// PROBABILMENTE DA TOGLIERE DOPO IL DEBUG
566void dump_cvector(double *, int, int, ptrdiff_t *, ptrdiff_t *, char *, int);
567void dump_rvector(double *, int, ptrdiff_t *, ptrdiff_t *, char *, int);
568
569/* prototypes for functions defined in allocations.c */
570int organize_main_memory(void);
571int allocate_main_memory(void);
572int deallocate_fft_vectors(int);
573int reallocate_memory_for_fragmentation(void);
574// int rearrange_memory(int);
575
576/* prototypes for functions defined in GenIC.c */
577int GenIC(int);
578int GenIC_large(int); // NE BASTA UNA?
579// double VarianceOnGrid(int, double); //, double);
580
581/* prototypes for functions defined in initialization.c */
582int initialization();
583int find_start(int, int, int);
584int find_length(int, int, int);
585int set_parameters(void);
586int set_grids(void);
587int set_subboxes(void);
588int set_smoothing(void);
589void greetings(void);
590int check_parameters_and_directives(void);
591
592/* prototypes in write_snapshot.c */
593#ifdef SNAPSHOT
594int write_density(int);
595int write_LPT_snapshot(void);
596int write_timeless_snapshot(void);
597#endif
598
599/* prototypes for functions defined in cosmo.c */
600int initialize_cosmology();
601int initialize_MassVariance();
602double OmegaMatter(double);
603double OmegaLambda(double);
604double Hubble(double);
605double Ez(double);
606double Hubble_Gyr(double);
607double fomega(double, double);
608double fomega_2LPT(double, double);
609double fomega_3LPT_2(double, double);
610double fomega_3LPT_1(double, double);
611double CosmicTime(double);
612double InverseCosmicTime(double);
613double GrowingMode(double, double);
614double GrowingMode_2LPT(double, double);
615double GrowingMode_3LPT_1(double, double);
616double GrowingMode_3LPT_2(double, double);
617double InverseGrowingMode(double, int);
618double ComovingDistance(double);
619double DiameterDistance(double);
620double InverseComovingDistance(double);
621double PowerSpectrum(double);
622double MassVariance(double);
623double dMassVariance_dr(double);
624double DisplVariance(double);
625double Radius(double);
626double SizeForMass(double);
627double MassForSize(double);
628double dOmega_dVariance(double, double);
629double AnalyticMassFunction(double, double);
630double WindowFunction(double);
631double my_spline_eval(gsl_spline *, double, gsl_interp_accel *);
632double my_spline_eval_deriv(gsl_spline *, double, gsl_interp_accel *);
633int jac(double, const double[], double *, double[], void *);
634
635/* prototypes for functions defined in ReadParamFile.c */
636int read_parameter_file();
637
638/* prototypes for functions defined in fmax.c */
639int compute_fmax(void);
640int compute_displacements(int, int, double);
641int compute_first_derivatives(double, int, int, double *);
642/* Fast path for scale-independent growth: rescale per-particle displacement
643 fields from z_prev to z_curr instead of recomputing FFT derivatives. */
644int scale_products_displacements(double z_prev, double z_curr);
645char *fdate(void);
646int dump_products(void);
647int read_dumps(void);
648
649#ifdef TWO_LPT
650/* prototypes for functions defined in LPT.c */
651int compute_LPT_displacements(int, double);
652#endif
653
654/* prototypes for functions defined in distribute.c */
655int distribute(void);
656int distribute_back(void);
657
658/* prototypes for functions defined in fragment.c */
659int fragment_driver(void);
660int get_mapup_bit(unsigned int);
661int get_map_bit(unsigned int);
662int get_map_bit_coord(int, int, int);
663void set_mapup_bit(int, int, int);
664int estimate_file_size(void);
665double compute_Nhalos_in_PLC(double, double);
666
667/* prototypes for functions defined in build_groups.c */
668int build_groups(int, double, int);
669int quick_build_groups(int);
670int update_map(unsigned int *);
671
672// RIMETTERE LA LETTURA DEL WHITE NOISE
673// #ifdef WHITENOISE
674// int read_white_noise(void);
675// #endif
676
677/* fragmentation prototypes */
678void condition_for_accretion(int, int, int, int, int, PRODFLOAT, int, double *, double *); // LEVARE primo argomento
679void condition_for_merging(PRODFLOAT, int, int, int *);
680void set_obj(int, PRODFLOAT, pos_data *);
681void set_obj_vel(int, PRODFLOAT, pos_data *);
682void set_point(int, int, int, int, PRODFLOAT, pos_data *);
683void set_group(int, pos_data *);
684PRODFLOAT q2x(int, pos_data *, int, double, int);
685PRODFLOAT vel(int, pos_data *);
686PRODFLOAT distance(int, pos_data *, pos_data *);
687void clean_list(int *);
688PRODFLOAT virial(int, PRODFLOAT, int);
689void merge_groups(int, int, PRODFLOAT);
690void update_history(int, int, PRODFLOAT);
691void accretion(int, int, int, int, int, PRODFLOAT);
692void update(pos_data *, pos_data *);
693int write_catalog(int);
694#ifdef ONLYFORFIRSTBHS
695int write_histories(int);
696#else
697int write_histories(void);
698#endif
699int compute_mf(int);
700int find_location(int, int, int);
701#ifdef PLC
702int write_PLC();
703void coord_transformation_cartesian_polar(PRODFLOAT *, double *, double *, double *);
704#endif
